ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Final Distribution/Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Dec-28-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Final Distribution/Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Dec-14-2016 Continued To Dec-28-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James O'Neil for (administrator) Patricia Caracter.

Mr. O'Neil reported that the administrator is reviewing the Petition for Final Distribution now and that they expect to file it this week. The status on filing a petition for final distribution was continued to December 28, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Chan. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Receipt For Funds Into A Blocked Account
Off Calendar Oct-25-2016 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-25-2016 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Oct-18-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Receipt For Funds Into A Blocked Account
Off Calendar Sep-27-2016 Continued To Oct-25-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator Patricia Caracter and the Attorney James O'Neil to appear on October 25, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they are not present and why the receipt for funds into a blocked account has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Receipt For Funds Into A Blocked Account
Off Calendar Sep-13-2016 Continued To Sep-27-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Vincent Yu for personaal representative Patricia Caracter.

The Court requested a status update. Mr. Yu informed the Court that the sale of the property had been unexpectedly delayed, as the buyer's original financing had fallen through. This had required a delay in the closing of escrow while a new lender was obtained. The sale is now projected to close on September 15, 2016, and the funds should be placed in the blocked account upon disbursement from escrow. Mr. Yu requested a brief continuance. The matter was continued to September 27, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Chan. (Not reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Aug-08-2016 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (4068 Folsom St, Sf Ca 94110)
Off Calendar Aug-12-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James O'Neil for Patricia Caracter.

The Court stated that we have now crossed off the procedural issues, that the estate holds 33% interest but the sale will be for 100% interest. The sale for 100% interest was confirmed at $858,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed June 30, 2016. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Status on filing receipts for funds placed in the blocked account(s) is set for September 13, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Estate
Off Calendar Jul-20-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Estate
Off Calendar Jul-06-2016 Continued To Jul-20-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James O'Neil for (petitioner) Patricia Caracter.

The Court asked for a status on filing a petition for final distribution or a petition to approve a status report on administration. Mr. O'Neil stated that it was filed last night, that they expect distribution to take place in the next 3-4 months, that they have a hearing date of July 26, 2016 on a Report of Sale, requests 120 day continuance to close the estate and submitted the File & Serve transaction receipt on the petition filed last night for the court's review. The Court asked if there will be a new appraisal for sale. Mr. O'Neil replied yes and that they will be doing a new date of death value. The status of closing the estate was continued to July 20, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
